title: pelargonium × kolowrathianum
intro: Pelargonium × kolowrathianum, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium Roseum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae, originating from the mountainous regions of South Africa. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × kolowrathianum include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and aid in the management of menopausal symptoms. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers are typically infused in hot water to make a tea, or used in essential oil form to promote relaxation and well-being.
